description: Fix code examples and behavior descriptions in guide documentation pages that would cause runtime failures or confusion
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Fix postJSON schema argument position in plugin development guide
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want correct code examples so that Zod schema validation actually works when I copy the pattern
acceptanceCriteria: plugin-development.mdx postJSON-with-schema example passes undefined as the 3rd argument (init) and the schema as the 4th argument
The surrounding explanation accurately describes the 4-argument signature: postJSON(url, body, init?, schema?)
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes

userStories.title: Fix class vs instance export in resources-prompts guide
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want a correct plugin export example so that the build command succeeds
acceptanceCriteria: resources-prompts.mdx full plugin example exports an instance (export default new TrackerPlugin()) not the class (export default class TrackerPlugin)
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes

userStories.title: Fix fetchJSON POST example and error handling custom codes in guides
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want correct API usage examples and accurate error handling documentation
acceptanceCriteria: resources-prompts.mdx createItem tool example uses postJSON instead of fetchJSON with manual POST options (or at minimum sets Content-Type header)
error-handling.mdx accurately states that ALL factory methods (auth, notFound, rateLimited, validation, timeout, internal) accept an optional custom code parameter, not just notFound
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
